name: Kottopoula Me Mpamiez (Chicken with Okra)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chickens. If they are whole, cut into serving pieces.
2. Season lightly with salt and pepper, and set aside to drain.
3. Wash the okra and carefully remove the stems without cutting the okra.
4. Line up the okra in a large flat pan and sprinkle with vinegar.
5. Place in the sun for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
6. Brown the butter in a pot.
7. Add the chicken and sauté until brown.
8. Add the onion and let it brown.
9. Add the tomatoes and boil for 3 to 5 minutes.
10. Add water. Simmer for 30 minutes.
11. Add the okra and continue to simmer, covered, until tender.
12. Watch carefully as this may need a little more water. The okra will have absorbed the liquid, leaving only oil when the dish is cooked.
